methodology: static import analysis (ast + grep) across all *.py files, excluding .venv/; dynamic validation via pytest with each candidate temporarily excluded

candidates.justification: 325 MB Node.js app with zero Python imports, no CI pipeline integration, no test references. The production tool runs entirely via Streamlit (regime_trader/ui/streamlit_app.py). No API glue code connects this React app to the Python backend at runtime.

candidates.description: Google Cloud Functions deployment shell script (gcf_deploy.sh)
candidates.justification: Single bash script for GCF deployment. Referenced only in documentation prose, not in any CI workflow or test. Cloud scheduler code lives in cloud/ which has active test coverage and is kept.

candidates.description: Intelligence engine and sources (LLM / news aggregation)
candidates.justification: Module is self-contained with zero external Python importers. Not imported by streamlit_app, discovery_scanner, backend, or any page. README and requirements.txt contain text references only. log_manager/ depends solely on this module.

candidates.description: Custom log manager used by intelligence/
candidates.justification: Exclusively depended on by intelligence/ which is itself being archived. After intelligence/ is removed, log_manager/ has no live callers. Archived alongside intelligence/.

kept.reason: Imported by core modules and backend
